caption: 🔥 Did you know 70% of dieters regain weight? 🤯 Leptin resistance is the hidden culprit. 💡 Here are the facts: Leptin is a hormone that regulates energy balance. 👉 When you're leptin-resistant, your brain thinks you're starving, even if you're eating enough. 📉 This leads to overeating and weight gain. 🏋️‍♀️ Exercise and diet can help, but it's not just about calories in vs out. 🤝 Share with someone who's struggling with weight loss. Follow @healthrecode for daily science-backed health tips. Save this so you don't lose it! Don't forget to tag a friend who needs to see this. 💕 #leptinresistance #weightloss #hormones #dietfail #healthyliving #weightlossjourney #hormonebalance #metabolism
